component.name: Gost
component.summary: Academic essay templater for LaTeX and Typst

description.p: Gost is a native GTK4 / libadwaita desktop application that generates fully-configured LaTeX and Typst essay templates for academic writing. It supports SBL, Chicago (Notes), MLA, APA 7th edition, ASA, Turabian, and Harvard citation styles, each with correct heading formatting, page numbering, and running headers.

ul.li: Compiled PDF preview via typst or latexmk
Chapter list with single-file and multi-file project export
10 journal style packs (JBL, NTS, CBQ, HTR, Turabian, APA, MLA…)
42-entry CSL style browser for Typst bibliography
LanguageTool grammar check (public or self-hosted API)
Language support: Russian, Hebrew, Japanese, Tibetan, Sanskrit, Greek, Chinese
Template profiles — save and reload named configurations

screenshot.caption: Main window showing citation style and layout settings
